name: Special Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup frozen miniature peanut butter cups, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
Set aside. Beat the peanut butter and butter together until fluffy in a
separate bowl. Add the sugars and beat until light and smooth. Then add
the egg and vanilla, mixing well. Stir in the dry ingredients and mix
thoroughly. Pour in the milk and fold in gently to soften the dough.
Fold in the chocolate chips and peanuts, then carefully fold in the
chopped peanut butter cups. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an
ungreased cookie sheet, leaving enough space between each for expansion.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until just browned. Do not overbake so they do not become too dry. Remove with a spatula to a cooling rack.
